source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'iTracker__SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Counts_Normalization268_') AS iTracker__SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'iTracker__TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Counts_Normalization268_') AS iTracker__TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS WFT_iTracker_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS WFT_iTracker_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Counts_Normalization268__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'WFT_iTrackerLoad_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_WFT_iTracker_Load270__sink_TableName;

SELECT SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   COUNT(COMBID) INSTANCES, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating, solutionstatus,                        Title,                       SolutionGroup  	    	       FROM [cooiTracker2].[dbo].[vSORFeedsPrimary] (NOLOCK) a   where CAST(validateddate AS DATE) BETWEEN cast(getdate()-395  as date ) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) or validateddate is null       GROUP BY  	   SN_CIO, 	   Server_WFGUID, 	   App_WFGUID, 	   ResponsibleParty, 	   [STATUS], 	   a.FeedType, 	   FirstDetected, 	   ConsequenceModelEscalationDate, 	   DueDate, 	   APPResponsibleDate, 	   TargetVersion, 	   ValidatedDate,                       Rating,solutionstatus,Title,                       SolutionGroup

SELECT TOP (12) REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(SOLUTIONGROUP,'MW CONFIG - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS PATCH - ',''),'DB CONFIG - ',''), 'QUALYS PATH ' ,''),'MW EOL - ',''),'MW PATCHING - ',''),'DB EOL - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS EOL - ','') SOLUTIONGROUP, SUM(INSTANCES) TOTALINSTANCES ,GETDATE() AS import_date FROM [PLHS].[DBO].[VW_WFT_TCOO_ITRACKER_METRICS_TOPCOUNTS_LASTMONTH] WHERE RESPONSIBLEPARTY IN ('APPLICATION TEAM','ASSIGNED PRODUCT/PLATFORM') AND FEEDTYPE ='QUALYS' GROUP BY SOLUTIONGROUP ORDER BY TOTALINSTANCES DESC ) , CTE2 AS ( SELECT TOP (12) REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SOLUTIONGROUP,'MW CONFIG - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS PATCH - ',''),'DB CONFIG - ',''), 'QUALYS PATH ' ,''),'MW EOL - ',''),'MW PATCHING - ',''),'DB EOL - ',''),'APP PRODUCTS EOL - ','') SOLUTIONGROUP, SUM(INSTANCES) TOTALINSTANCES FROM [PLHS].[DBO].[VW_WFT_TCOO_ITRACKER_METRICS_TOPCOUNTS_LASTMONTH] A WHERE RESPONSIBLEPARTY IN ('APPLICATION TEAM','ASSIGNED PRODUCT/PLATFORM') AND FEEDTYPE !='QUALYS' GROUP BY SOLUTIONGROUP ORDER BY TOTALINSTANCES DESC ) SELECT *, 'QUALYS' SOURCESYSTEM FROM CTE1 UNION ALL SELECT *, 'NON-QUALYS' SOURCESYSTEM FROM CTE2
